title: Неправильные глаголы — flashcards
description: Тройки V1 → V2 → V3 и пары-ловушки, которые путают чаще всего.

cards.back: go → went → gone. «I went to the shop.» — Past Simple. «I had gone before she arrived.» — Past Perfect.
see → saw → seen. «I saw her yesterday.» «I had never seen this film before.»
do → did → done. «I did my homework.» «I had done everything by 8.» Также did — вспомогательный для вопросов и отрицаний.
have → had → had. V2 и V3 совпадают. «I had breakfast.» «I had had breakfast before the call.» — два had подряд, это нормально.
be → was/were → been. Единственный глагол, где V2 зависит от лица: I/he/she/it was, you/we/they were.
write → wrote → written. «I wrote a letter.» «She had written the report before lunch.»
read → read → read. Пишутся одинаково, но V2 и V3 читаются «рэд» (как red), а V1 — «рид». «I read /рид/ books. Yesterday I read /рэд/ a novel.»
take → took → taken. «I took the bus.» «He had taken the keys before he left.»
give → gave → given. «She gave me a book.» «By that time he had given his answer.»
find → found → found. V2 и V3 совпадают. «I found my keys.» «She had found the mistake before the meeting.»
think → thought → thought. «I thought it was Tuesday.» «I had thought about it before answering.»
buy → bought → bought. «We bought a flat in 2019.» «They had bought tickets in advance.»
leave → left → left. «I left at 7.» «The train had left before we got to the station.»
say → said → said. tell → told → told. say что-то (say hello), tell кому-то (tell me a story). Не «say me» — это калька с русского.
lay (класть) → laid → laid (нужен объект: lay a book on the table). lie (лежать) → lay → lain (без объекта: lie on the sofa). Lie (врать) — отдельный глагол: lie → lied → lied.
hang (вешать предмет) → hung → hung. hang (казнить через повешение) → hanged → hanged. «I hung the picture.» vs «He was hanged in 1745.»
